script: echo '=== Vault: any bridge/edge/teams-admin entries? ==='; az keyvault secret list --vault-name SDN-YooVault --query "[?contains(name,'bridge') || contains(name,'edge') || contains(name,'teams-admin') || contains(name,'cloudflare')].name" -o tsv 2>&1; echo; echo '=== All vault secret names ==='; az keyvault secret list --vault-name SDN-YooVault --query '[].name' -o tsv 2>&1 | sort
